name: X-Golf Powell
address: 285 W Olentangy St Suite 101, Powell, OH 43065
about: X-Golf Powell is an indoor golf facility offering a range of services including tee time bookings, lessons, club fittings, and sales. The venue provides a convenient way for golfers to practice their game with features like online booking through U-Schedule and membership options. It also hosts events and offers eGift cards for purchase. The facility appears to be part of a larger X-Golf network, suggesting a standardized experience with technology-focused indoor simulation capabilities. Its primary services are centered around practice improvement and equipment fitting, making it a resource for players looking to refine their skills year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient indoor golf simulation technology for year-round practice
Comprehensive services including lessons, fittings, and club sales
Flexible booking system with options for both casual play and event hosting

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB is not mentioned; food and drink availability is unclear
BYOB is not mentioned; alcohol availability is unclear

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor implied by X-Golf brand standard

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club fittings and sales, but it is not explicitly stated whether you must bring your own clubs to play. It is best to check with them directly if you plan to use your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on bringing outside food and drinks. For the most current information on their BYOB policy, it is recommended to contact X-Golf Powell directly before your visit.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round at X-Golf Powell typically takes between 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players in your bay and the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Powell appears to be kid-friendly, offering a welcoming atmosphere that can be enjoyed by families and junior golfers.
